attempts.location: Western Canada, Kaie has been creating urban legends
attempts.snippet: intricate, dreamlike tales of monsters and magic. Born in Vancouver and raised all across Western Canada, Kaie has been creating urban legends about witches in the back wood and fairies in the snow melt since she was seven years old
